---
about:
  template: jolla
  id: about-block
  image: "assets/bg.jpg"
  links:
    - icon: facebook
      text: Facebook
      href: https://www.facebook.com/toru.watanabe3ti/ 
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/watanabe3tipapa
---

::: {#about-block}
:::

# *Welcome to watanabe3tipapa.github.io!*

***Bricoleur / Toolsmith のもうひとつのポータル***

![](assets/UC900.png){fig-align="center" width="300"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](assets/demo-badge.svg){fig-align="center"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

[「ターミナルの仕業」シリーズ](/projects/HowtoexecutefromTerminal.html) \\
[Projects](/projects/project.qmd) \\
[Articles](/articles/note.qmd)
